name: Jalepeno-Cheese Dip - Texas Style
recipeInstructions:
1. For variety, pickled carrots can be substituted for jalapenos.
2. For different effects, additional carrots and/or jalapenos can be finely diced and added to the dip.
3. The dip increases in jalapeno strength with age.
4. Use a blender to liquify the jalapenos, then onion (cut into 1-inch cubes), and cheese.
5. When well blended, mix everything in a bowl with mayonnaise.
6. Store the dip in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
